channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Located between number 56 - 55 Bottom of 55 stairs in 55s garden, 12th March
item.description:
A wooden fence is damaged and leaning towards the wall that is facing a public foot path. this Needs to be resolved as people from the estate use this foot path including vulnerable resident's and parents who push their buggies. This should be located once you reach the walk way. Please have this looked into urgently to prevent any accidents.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Southampton Road, Gospel Oak, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned Vehicle in Waldstock Road, 12th March
item.description:
Abandoned Vehicle in Waldstock Road,Thamesmead. It has been parked in the same position for over two months and is not in a fit road worthy condition

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Waldstock Road, Thamesmead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Car seat and bedside table dumped on the pavement, 12th March
item.description:
A baby car seat and a bedside table left on the pavement outside 54 Balliol Road Welling, after the owner’s moved out!

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Balliol Road, East Wickham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipping outside settled Travellers site, 12th March
item.description:
Terrible flytipping on the corner of Star Lane with Sweeps Lane

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Sweeps Lane, St Mary Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish still there as previously reported, 12th March
item.description:
Pothole outside 55 still there and same rubbish still on road and pavements
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 4, Wisley Road, St Paul's Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Damaged street light, 12th March
item.description:
Leening or damaged street light.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Mayday Gardens, Kidbrooke
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish been here for months, 12th March
item.description:
Beer bottles and various litters are here. You closed the report stating this is not your problem, but the grass here has been cut recently. So who cut the grass? AROUND THE BOTTLES AND LITTER!!!!
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Kestlake Road, Blendon, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pothole on drain outside number 55 still has not been fixed, 12th March
item.description:
Your report says both potholes on drains have been fixed on Wisley Road. Outside number 42 Wisley is fixed Outside number 55 and rain, dangerous pothole has NOT been fixed 8993715 reference number
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 4, Wisley Road, St Paul's Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Near corner, 12th March
item.description:
Unreadable

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Frognal, South Hampstead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: O/s Pavilion Court, 12th March
item.description:
Sofa, mattress, shoes, books and tables left o/s Pavilion Court - please remove
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Stafford Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Large - More than a van load

item.title: 64 Norwood road, 12th March
item.description:
There has been an ongoing issue at this property for months. A small domestic rubbish bin appeared but has now gone, meaning rubbish is just being dumped on the pavement outside for the foxes to get at. It's a real mess.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Norwood Road, Tulse Hill, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Air conditioner / humidifier dumped on pavement, 12th March
item.description:
Fly tipping - air conditioner or humidifier. By alley west end of Fendyke road by number 9

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Fendyke Road, West Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Filthy street due to rubbish pile up, 12th March
item.description:
This street corner is disgusting as a result of constant food waste piling up here

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Shorncliffe Road, Old Kent Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Broken bin, 12th March
item.description:
Broken, obstructing pavement, unsightly

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 57, East Dulwich Road, East Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping, 12th March
item.description:
Fly tipping

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Basingdon Way, Dulwich Village, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Syringes with needles exposed along with rubbish on the pavement, 12th March
item.description:
Resident reporting there are some fruit peels along with syringes & needles exposed just thrown onto the pavement it is right up against the yellow bin on the pavement, this after someone has kicked it with the foot. Please could this get removed from the ground as it is very dangerous for all public & animals especially children who all use this popular route. Please could the CREW be careful when the bin gets emptied and there are more needles in the bin.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 3, Longlands Road, Longlands, Sidcup, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Please pick up litter, 12th March
item.description:
Please pick up litter

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Basingdon Way, Dulwich Village, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned pick up truck full of waste and attracting fly tipping, 12th March
item.description:
The van is still there - nothing has changed - why no more updates?
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Lodge Hill, East Wickham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dead fox in double bagged black bin liners, 12th March
item.description:
Dead fox found in shed. Neighbour has removed it & double bagged it as resident is 90 years old & unable to remove or dispose of privately. Bag needs to be collected from outside residents house as per photo

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 163a, Eden Park Avenue, Eden Park, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Excessive litter Knightland Road pavement obstructions bags of rubbish, recycling, bins, dumped household furniture, large empty cardboard boxes, building materials, chained up cycles, uneven broken pavements or tree roots., 12th March
item.description:
Excessive litter Knightland Road pavement obstructions bags of rubbish, recycling, bins, dumped household furniture, large empty cardboard boxes, building materials, chained up cycles, uneven broken pavements or tree roots.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Knightland Road, Hackney, London
